query:
UPDATE games 
SET publishedModel = 1, publishedToFeed = 1
WHERE gameDate = '2026-03-21' 
  AND sport = 'NCAAM'
  AND awayBookSpread IS NOT NULL
  AND awayModelSpread IS NOT NULL
  AND modelTotal IS NOT NULL;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3AW8r3RRauadYzS.root --database MW3FicTy7ae3qrm8dx8Lua --execute 
UPDATE games 
SET publishedModel = 1, publishedToFeed = 1
WHERE gameDate = '2026-03-21' 
  AND sport = 'NCAAM'
  AND awayBookSpread IS NOT NULL
  AND awayModelSpread IS NOT NULL
  AND modelTotal IS NOT NULL;
